entries.summary: the mash stuck at 40 degrees because the grain was milled too fine

body.details: a slow sparge follows a stuck mash; coarser mill settings drain clean

entries.summary: aphids returned within a week when the ladybirds were released too early

body.details: predator releases only hold after the colony has food to stay for

entries.summary: the drawer rails bound in summer because the runners were cut cross-grain

body.details: seasonal movement doubles across the grain; rails want long-grain runners

entries.summary: the guide star drifted because the mount's polar axis was off by a degree

body.details: drift aligns faster than plate solving when the pole is nearly right

entries.summary: the sourdough collapsed after proofing past the poke-test window

body.details: a slow spring-back is the last safe moment; a no-spring dent is too late

entries.summary: the spinnaker wrapped when the pole was squared before the sheet was loaded

body.details: load the working sheet first; geometry follows tension, not the reverse

entries.summary: the handles cracked at the join because the slip was drier than the mug body

body.details: joins want matched moisture; score both faces and slip generously

entries.summary: the swarm left despite space because the brood nest was honey-bound

body.details: supers do not relieve a packed brood nest; checkerboarding does

entries.summary: the star trails smeared because mirror slap shook the first two seconds

body.details: mirror lock-up or electronic first curtain removes the smear entirely

entries.summary: the curd never set because the milk was ultra-pasteurized

body.details: UP milk's denatured proteins cannot knit; low-temp pasteurized sets fine

entries.summary: the rope drag doubled on the traverse because the draws were all short

body.details: alternating long slings on wandering pitches keeps the line straight

entries.summary: the moon phase determines the best day to prune the orchard

body.details: rejected as folklore: pruning outcomes tracked over two seasons showed no lunar correlation

entries.summary: always sand against the grain for a smoother finish

body.details: superseded: cross-grain scratches read worse under finish; sand WITH the grain

entries.summary: covered the scheduler retry loop with characterization tests before the refactor

body.details: the seat run pinned the retry loop's backoff behaviour with six characterization tests; the refactor then landed green

entries.summary: the cone-six glaze crawled where the bisque was dusty

body.details: crawling follows dust and oil on bisque; a damp sponge wipe before glazing stops it
